name_en: M83689 Rabbit🐰! From the collaboration series between Louis Vuitton Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, known for depicting mass-produced items with vibrant brushstrokes. The Zippy Large Wallet has a capacity comparable to a small bag. It features a smartphone pocket and can hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily stores personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Dimensions 19Cmx10cm.
